ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "real_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g. admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" INTEGER /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g. pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saved_items" (
  "saved_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved item */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who saved the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saved item */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date the item was saved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the saved item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the saved item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saved_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_items_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g. 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who created the collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_collections_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_items" (
  "collection_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection item */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection that the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_items_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES item_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g. orderplaced, itemviewed, etc.) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)
